design_strategy.reasoning: For a Gen Z university student audience, a sterile corporate look is boring, and dark tech looks too intense for buying second-hand books and food. A Neo-Brutalist layout with pastel accents creates a 'digital notebook' feel that is both highly trustworthy and distinctly youthful.

colors.color_usage_rules: Use the main background #F9F9F6 for the app. All interactive cards and structural containers MUST have a 2px solid black border and a hard shadow (e.g. shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]). Use pastel accents (mint, lavender, yellow, peach) as solid background fills for category cards or 'new' tags to offset the harshness of the black lines.

typography.rules: Headings must never be perfectly centered unless explicitly designed as a balanced hero text. Use left-alignment for dense content and product names. Buttons should have uppercase, tracked-out text for a utilitarian feel.

surfaces_and_borders.card_style: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-lg shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]
surfaces_and_borders.input_style: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(37,99,235,1)] transition-shadow
surfaces_and_borders.button_primary: bg-black text-white border-2 border-black rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors
surfaces_and_borders.button_secondary: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#FEF08A] transition-colors

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding. p-6 or p-8 inside cards so content doesn't collide with the thick borders.
layout_and_spacing.grid_bento: For the homepage categories and featured sections, use an asymmetrical bento grid. Mix col-span-1 (tall) and col-span-2 (wide) items. Leave intentional negative space.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Sticky top navbar with a solid white background, bottom 2px black border, and no shadow to maintain the flat architectural look. Logo on left, search bar in center (desktop), links/profile on right.

component_instructions.shadcn_customization: Override default shadcn component styles. Remove 'rounded-md' and 'shadow-sm' where they conflict with the neo-brutalist spec. Replace subtle borders with 'border-2 border-black'.
component_instructions.cards: Product cards must have large, edge-to-edge images (or at least p-4 with the image contained), a thick black separator line between the image and the text, and bold price typography.
component_instructions.badges: Use high-contrast pastel background badges (e.g., bg-[#A7F3D0] border border-black text-black) for categories or item conditions (e.g., 'Like New', 'Notes').
component_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='login-button').

hero_image.description: Group of smiling students taking a selfie in a classroom. Use in the homepage hero section. Apply a slight monochrome or duotone filter, or just standard colors with a hard black border.

category_books.description: Pile of textbooks. Use for the 'Books/Notes' category thumbnail.

category_electronics.description: Laptop on a wooden desk. Use for the 'Gadgets/Electronics' category thumbnail.

icons.style: Use stroke-width 2.5 or 3 for icons to match the thick borders of the Neo-Brutalist UI.
